author: jsign
content:
<@628018527470616606> , yes, we have all the releases in [zkevm@v0.4.1](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-zkevm%40v0.4.1). The .tar.gz has both `blockchain_test` and also `blockchain_test_engine`. The latter is the more appropiate one for EngineAPI runs.

I could also try running it since I've set up a Hive runner where I can configure EL branches and give it a go on a smaller set of fixtures -- is that PR above branch support normal `engine_newPayloadWithWitnessV5`  with JSON-RPC, or only SSZ mode? The former would be ideal since the latter is still in flux reg on how that will work in general.

author: jsign
content:
<@628018527470616606> trying that branch above mainly makes the hive simulator skip all the test runs since I think `engine_newPayloadWithWitnessV5` via JSON-RPC isn't supported.
`21 May 12:56:39 | Error response handling JsonRpc Id:2 Method:engine_newPayloadWithWitnessV5 | Code: -32601 Message: The method 'engine_newPayloadWithWitnessV5' is not supported. `
